creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text: A new attack on AMD Zen CPUs has just been published at https://lock.cmpxchg8b.com/zenbleed.html. AMD has released a microcode updated closing the exploitable vulnerability, but a workaround via cpuctl is possible (probably with a higher performance penalty). Waiting for mainboard vendors to release firmware updates including the updated microcode and users to install it is unrealistic. This port should be the best delivery mechanism available to FreeBSD users.
